title: stage_08_evaluate
content:
好的！我先读取当前阶段文档和代码，看还缺什么。
# 读取所有阶段文档
让我直接查看项目中实际存在的文件：
import os
# 检查项目录是否存在
base = "projects/scientific-quiz"
print(f"项目录存在: {os.path.exists(base)}")
# 列出所有子目录和文件
for root, dirs, files in os.walk("projects"):
level = root.replace("projects", "").count(os.sep)
indent = " " * level
print(f"{indent}{os.path.basename(root)}/")
subindent = " " * (level + 1)
for file in files:
print(f"{subindent}{file}")
python
工具调用: skill_state_reader(success)；artifact_reader(failed)；artifact_reader(failed)；artifact_reader(failed)；artifact_reader(failed)；artifact_reader(failed)；code_runner(success)
